info.name: Talk Transcripts
info.summary: Automatic transcription and summarization for Nextcloud Talk recordings
info.description:
**Auto-transcribe every Talk recording.**
When a Nextcloud Talk call recording finishes and lands in the user's Files, this app picks it up, sends the audio to a Whisper-compatible transcription service, writes the transcript as a Markdown file alongside the recording, and (optionally) generates a one-page summary with action items via an LLM.
**Works with any OpenAI-compatible API:**
- OpenAI Whisper (whisper-1) for transcription - OpenAI Chat Completions (gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o) for summaries - Anthropic Messages API (Claude) for summaries - Self-hosted endpoints (faster-whisper-server, Ollama, LM Studio) — anything OpenAI-compatible
**Privacy-first:** all credentials live in your Nextcloud's config. No data flows through any third party other than the AI provider you configure. If you point it at a self-hosted Whisper + Ollama, nothing leaves your server.
Built by Bestly LLC. Released under AGPLv3.
info.author: Bestly LLC
